summary: Frontend E2E tested HidroFarm Sim Phase 1 (FSM docs) + Phase 2 (game). 13/13 FSM routes render with SVG diagrams. Home page renders hero + 13 cards + CTAs. Game page initial state correct (Rp200, hari 1, stamina 100%, Fajar 06:00). Shop/Market/Inventory/Sleep modals all work. Buy selada decrements saldo 200→185. Pause toggle works. Sleep restores stamina to 100%. LocalStorage persistence verified (key 'hidrofarm_save_v1'). Only blocker: FarmGrid slot tiles lack data-testid attributes, so the plant flow (slot click → SlotModal → plant seed) could not be exercised via automation.

ui_bugs.issue: Slot tiles do not expose data-testid attributes (e.g., slot-0, slot-1...). Blocks automated testing of plant/water/harvest flows via SlotModal. The grid renders #1..#12 visibly and is clickable in UI, but no testable selector.

action_items: Add data-testid="slot-{id}" to each slot button inside /app/frontend/src/game/components/FarmGrid.jsx so SlotModal/plant flow can be tested automatically.
(Optional) Manually verify plant flow: click slot -> SlotModal opens -> 'Pilih bibit' -> click selada -> slot status becomes 'seeded' with 🌱.
critical_code_review_comments: useGame TICK reducer is large (~100 lines) and pure but does Math.random inside the reducer (non-deterministic). Acceptable for a game but makes reducer technically impure.
GameModals.jsx is ~385 lines; consider splitting per-modal for maintainability.
localStorage save happens on every reducer action, including TICK (every 2.5s). Fine for now but watch for write storms over long sessions.
Backend exists but is unused per request — verified no backend calls from UI.

success_rate.frontend: ~92% (12/13 flows verified; slot click flow blocked by missing testid)

seed_data_creation: Cleared localStorage before testing; tests created in-game inventory state only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Once data-testid=slot-{id} is added to FarmGrid tiles, re-run plant flow: open /game, paused, click [data-testid=btn-shop], click [data-testid=buy-seed-selada], close, click [data-testid=slot-0], expect [data-testid=slot-modal] then [data-testid=plant-seed-selada]. localStorage key is 'hidrofarm_save_v1'. All 13 FSM routes confirmed working: pembelian-bibit, penyemaian, penyiraman, pemberian-nutrisi, perbaikan-alat, panen-jual, siklus-tanaman, status-pemain, status-peralatan, ekonomi-pasar, sistem-cuaca, keseimbangan-ph, siklus-hari.
rca of the issue: FarmGrid component does not render data-testid on slot buttons. Fix: add `data-testid={`slot-${slot.id}`}` to the slot button element in /app/frontend/src/game/components/FarmGrid.jsx.
